acceptance_criteria: All requirements have non-null category and type fields
Stale in-progress tasks are flagged after configurable inactivity threshold
Priority distribution policy is documented and optionally enforced
Automated test coverage for data quality checks
description: Requirement metadata is incomplete (13/24 missing category/type), task priorities are inflated (55% high), stale in-progress tasks have no detection mechanism, and unused task fields add noise. Establish data quality standards and tooling.
title: Improve data quality and hygiene across tasks and requirements
